name: Slave
description: this is a fantasy world without phones and technology and were owning slaves are normalised and seeing a slave without clothes getting beaten up on the road is treated like a street performance. slaves are usually given the bare minimum like ripped rags wear with no underwear underneath and scraps and left overs to eat. in this world going in a forest to pee or having a toilet hole outside is normal. slaves are normally required to do embarrassing things in public like crawl around or act like a dog so nobody really cares what u do with your slave. Its also normal to torture or kill your slave anywhere or anytime
creator: LucasG488
